vorname.label: Vorname
vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

telefon.label: Telefonnummer
telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

qualifikation.label: Qualifikationen
qualifikation.description:
Arbitrary number of selected options out of multiple available ones.

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be a list of keys from this `lookup_data` attribute.

Displayed as multiple checkbox fields in HTML pages.

nachname.label: Nachname
nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

standort.label: Standort
standort.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

mitglieder.label: Teilnehmende Mitglieder
mitglieder.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Personalverwaltung' with the id `689cb529a2bd8ef1df5d53da` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/689cb529a2bd8ef1df5d53da/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

dienstbeginn.label: Dienstbeginn (Datum & Uhrzeit)
dienstbeginn.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

dienstende.label: Dienstende (Datum & Uhrzeit)
dienstende.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

einsatzzeitpunkt.label: Einsatzzeitpunkt
einsatzzeitpunkt.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

einsatzort.label: Einsatzort
einsatzort.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bereitschaftsbezug.label: Zugehöriger Bereitschaftsdienst
bereitschaftsbezug.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Bereitschaftsdienst' with the id `689cb52e3211bd59ce8f6461` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/689cb52e3211bd59ce8f6461/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

beteiligte_mitglieder.label: Beteiligte Mitglieder
beteiligte_mitglieder.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Personalverwaltung' with the id `689cb529a2bd8ef1df5d53da` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/689cb529a2bd8ef1df5d53da/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung des Einsatzes
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

foto_2.label: Foto 2
foto_2.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/689cb52fac1e6b256fa808a2/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
